A belső zsák alakemlékező polimerből készült, amely lehetővé teszi, hogy a levegő újbóli bevezetésekor visszanyerje eredeti alakját. items.raw_desc: Társas HitStory:                An evening of laughter with the HitStory board gameGet ready for an evening of rhythm, laughter and musical memories with the HitStory board game. The game is ideal for parties with friends or family, where each song becomes a challenge and an opportunity to have fun. Start the best playlist and listen carefully. Your task is to guess the year in which each song was released. If you manage to guess both the title of the song and the name of the artist, you will get points and everyone will applaud you. For even more fun, activate the "Surprise Guest" mode and turn each round into an unexpected surprise. Play continues until one player scores 7 points or the last refrain of the night is played - either way, the winner will be the star of the night. The game uses the HitStory app, which can be downloaded for free from Google Play or the App Store. You'll also need a mobile phone with an internet connection and a Spotify Premium account.                             12+        recommended age...
